# system.stemmers

<SystemTableCloud/>

Shows all available stemmers.
These can be used in the function [stem](../../sql-reference/functions/nlp-functions.md).

Columns:

<!--AUTOGENERATED_START-->
<!--AUTOGENERATED_END-->

**Example**

```sql
SELECT * FROM system.stemmers;
```

```text
 ┌─name───────┐
 │ arabic     │
 │ armenian   │
 │ basque     │
 │ catalan    │
 │ danish     │
 │ dutch      │
 │ english    │
 │ finnish    │
 │ french     │
 │ german     │
 │ greek      │
 │ hindi      │
 │ hungarian  │
 │ indonesian │
 │ irish      │
 │ italian    │
 │ lithuanian │
 │ nepali     │
 │ norwegian  │
 │ porter     │
 │ portuguese │
 │ romanian   │
 │ russian    │
 │ serbian    │
 │ spanish    │
 │ swedish    │
 │ tamil      │
 │ turkish    │
 │ yiddish    │
 └────────────┘
```
